scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix frontendV2Hostech
scripts.dev:allv2: npx concurrently "npm run dev:v2" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.dev:allv1: npx concurrently "npm run dev:premium" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.start: npx concurrently "npm run dev:v2" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:reverb" "npm run dev:queue"
